---
title: "MICB 305 Aim 4"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-18"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Loading Packages & Phyloseq object

```{r packages and data}
# Loading packages
library(tidyverse)
library(phyloseq)
library(vegan)

# Loading phyloseq object 
ps = readRDS("phyloseq_taxonomy.rds")
```

## Data Filtering & Grouping

```{r filtering}

# Removing non-MS participants and NAs from probiotics column
ps_filtered_untreated <- subset_samples(ps,
  treatments_grouped != "Control" &
  !is.na(probiotics))
  
# Grouping treatment types and probiotics into Oral_No, Oral_Yes, Non-Oral_No, Non-Oral_Yes, Non-oral_No, and Untreated 
meta_data <- as.data.frame(sample_data(ps_filtered_untreated))

meta_data$group <- ifelse(
  meta_data$treatments_grouped == "Untreated",
  "Untreated",
  paste(meta_data$treatments_grouped, meta_data$probiotics, sep = "_")
)

# Updating phyloseq object 
sample_data(ps_filtered_untreated) <- sample_data(meta_data)

# Rarefy data to sequencing depth of 6000
ps_rare_untreated = ps_filtered_untreated %>% rarefy_even_depth(sample.size = 6000, rngseed = 100)
```

## Beta Diversity Code

```{r beta Diversity}

# Calculating Distance Matrix 

# Bray Curtis
ps_bray_untreated = phyloseq::distance(ps_rare_untreated, method = "bray")
# Unweighted UniFrac
ps_uunifrac_untreated = phyloseq::distance(ps_rare_untreated, method = "uunifrac")
# Weighted UniFrac
ps_wunifrac_untreated = phyloseq::distance(ps_rare_untreated, method = "wunifrac")
# Jaccard
ps_jaccard_untreated = phyloseq::distance(ps_rare_untreated, method = "jaccard", binary = TRUE)

# MDS Scaling 

# Bray Curtis
set.seed(100)
mds_bray_untreated = metaMDS(ps_bray_untreated)
# Unweighted UniFrac
set.seed(100)
mds_uunifrac_untreated = metaMDS(ps_uunifrac_untreated)
# Weighted UniFrac
set.seed(100)
mds_wunifrac_untreated = metaMDS(ps_wunifrac_untreated)
# Jaccard
set.seed(100)
mds_jaccard_untreated = metaMDS(ps_jaccard_untreated)

# Extracting Data

mds_bray_data_untreated = mds_bray_untreated$points %>% as.data.frame %>%
  merge(sample_data(ps_rare_untreated), by = 'row.names', sort = F)

mds_uunifrac_data_untreated = mds_uunifrac_untreated$points %>% as.data.frame %>%
  merge(sample_data(ps_rare_untreated), by = 'row.names', sort = F)

mds_wunifrac_data_untreated = mds_wunifrac_untreated$points %>% as.data.frame %>%
  merge(sample_data(ps_rare_untreated), by = 'row.names', sort = F)

mds_jaccard_data_untreated = mds_jaccard_untreated$points %>% as.data.frame %>%
  merge(sample_data(ps_rare_untreated), by = 'row.names', sort = F)
```

## Beta Diversity Plots

```{r plot}
# Plotting all 4 metrics

# Picking colours for each group

group_colors <- c(
  "Oral_No"      = "#48CAe4",  # light blue
  "Oral_Yes"     = "#48CAe4",  # dark blue
  "Non-Oral_No"  = "#FA8072",  # pink
  "Non-Oral_Yes" = "#FA8072",  # red
  "Untreated"    = "#696969"   # grey
)

# Plotting metrics again, splitting plots into probiotics or non-probiotics compared to Untreated

# Bray Curtis No Probiotics Plot
bray_plot_no_untreated = mds_bray_data_untreated %>%
  filter(group %in% c("Oral_No", "Non-Oral_No", "Untreated")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(MDS1, MDS2, color = group)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.8) +
  stat_ellipse() +
  scale_color_manual(values = group_colors, name = "No Probiotics", labels = c(
    "Oral_No" = "Oral",
    "Non-Oral_No" = "Non-Oral",
    "Untreated" = "Untreated"
  )) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 18)
bray_plot_no_untreated

# Bray Curtis Probiotics Plot
bray_plot_yes_untreated = mds_bray_data_untreated %>%
  filter(group %in% c("Oral_Yes", "Non-Oral_Yes", "Untreated")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(MDS1, MDS2, color = group)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.8) +
  stat_ellipse() +
   scale_color_manual(values = group_colors, name = "Probiotics", labels = c(
    "Oral_Yes" = "Oral",
    "Non-Oral_Yes" = "Non-Oral",
    "Untreated" = "Untreated"
  )) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 18)
bray_plot_yes_untreated 

# Unweighted UniFrac No Probiotics Plot
uunifrac_plot_no_untreated = mds_uunifrac_data_untreated %>%
  filter(group %in% c("Oral_No", "Non-Oral_No", "Untreated")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(MDS1, MDS2, color = group)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.8) +
  stat_ellipse() +
  scale_color_manual(values = group_colors, name = "No Probiotics", labels = c(
    "Oral_No" = "Oral",
    "Non-Oral_No" = "Non-Oral",
    "Untreated" = "Untreated"
  )) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 18)
uunifrac_plot_no_untreated

# Unweighted UniFrac Probiotics Plot
uunifrac_plot_yes_untreated = mds_uunifrac_data_untreated %>%
  filter(group %in% c("Oral_Yes", "Non-Oral_Yes", "Untreated")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(MDS1, MDS2, color = group)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.8) +
  stat_ellipse() +
   scale_color_manual(values = group_colors, name = "Probiotics", labels = c(
    "Oral_Yes" = "Oral",
    "Non-Oral_Yes" = "Non-Oral",
    "Untreated" = "Untreated"
  )) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 18)
uunifrac_plot_yes_untreated

# Weighted UniFrac No Probiotics Plot
wunifrac_plot_no_untreated = mds_wunifrac_data_untreated %>%
  filter(group %in% c("Oral_No", "Non-Oral_No", "Untreated")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(MDS1, MDS2, color = group)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.8) +
  stat_ellipse() +
  scale_color_manual(values = group_colors, name = "No Probiotics", labels = c(
    "Oral_No" = "Oral",
    "Non-Oral_No" = "Non-Oral",
    "Untreated" = "Untreated"
  )) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 18)
wunifrac_plot_no_untreated

# Weighted UniFrac Probiotics Plot
wunifrac_plot_yes_untreated = mds_wunifrac_data_untreated %>%
  filter(group %in% c("Oral_Yes", "Non-Oral_Yes", "Untreated")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(MDS1, MDS2, color = group)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.8) +
  stat_ellipse() +
  scale_color_manual(values = group_colors, name = "Probiotics", labels = c(
    "Oral_Yes" = "Oral",
    "Non-Oral_Yes" = "Non-Oral",
    "Untreated" = "Untreated"
  )) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 18)
wunifrac_plot_yes_untreated

# Jaccard No Probiotics Plot
jaccard_plot_no_untreated = mds_jaccard_data_untreated %>%
  filter(group %in% c("Oral_No", "Non-Oral_No", "Untreated")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(MDS1, MDS2, color = group)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.8) +
  stat_ellipse() +
   scale_color_manual(values = group_colors, name = "No Probiotics", labels = c(
    "Oral_No" = "Oral",
    "Non-Oral_No" = "Non-Oral",
    "Untreated" = "Untreated"
  )) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 18)
jaccard_plot_no_untreated

# Jaccard Probiotics Plot
jaccard_plot_yes_untreated = mds_jaccard_data_untreated %>%
  filter(group %in% c("Oral_Yes", "Non-Oral_Yes", "Untreated")) %>%
  ggplot(aes(MDS1, MDS2, color = group)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.8) +
  stat_ellipse() +
  scale_color_manual(values = group_colors, name = "Probiotics", labels = c(
    "Oral_Yes" = "Oral",
    "Non-Oral_Yes" = "Non-Oral",
    "Untreated" = "Untreated"
  )) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 18)
jaccard_plot_yes_untreated
```

## Statistical Testing

```{r stats}

#Extract metadata
metadata = sample_data(ps_rare_untreated) %>% data.frame()

# PERMANOVA with interaction term Bray Curtis
set.seed(100)
stats_univar_2_bray_untreated = adonis2(ps_bray_untreated ~ treatments_grouped * probiotics,
        data = metadata,
        by = "margin")

# PERMANOVA with interaction term Unweighted UniFrac
set.seed(100)
stats_univar_2_uunifrac_untreated = adonis2(ps_uunifrac_untreated ~ treatments_grouped * probiotics,
        data = metadata,
        by = "margin")

# PERMANOVA with interaction term Weighted UniFrac
set.seed(100)
stats_univar_2_wunifrac_untreated = adonis2(ps_wunifrac_untreated ~ treatments_grouped * probiotics,
        data = metadata,
        by = "margin")

# PERMANOVA with interaction term Jaccard
set.seed(100)
stats_univar_2_jaccard_untreated = adonis2(ps_jaccard_untreated ~ treatments_grouped * probiotics,
        data = metadata,
        by = "margin")
```
